data.name: Auth.UnableToLogin
data.value: Melodee is unable to log you in. perhaps you are banned?

data.name: Auth.InvalidGoogleCredentials
data.value: Invalid Google credentials. Please try again.

data.name: Auth.GoogleSessionExpired
data.value: Your Google session has expired. Please sign in again.

data.name: Auth.GoogleAccountNotLinked
data.value: This Google account is not linked to any Melodee account. Please sign in with your password and link your Google account from your profile.

data.name: Auth.SignupDisabled
data.value: New account registration is currently disabled. Please contact an administrator.

data.name: Auth.ForbiddenTenant
data.value: Your Google account domain is not allowed. Please use a different account.

data.name: Auth.AccountDisabled
data.value: Your account has been disabled. Please contact support.

data.name: Auth.GoogleSignInError
data.value: An error occurred during Google Sign-In. Please try again.

data.name: Auth.SignInErrorTryAgain
data.value: An error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.

data.name: Auth.FillOutForm
data.value: Fill out this form and click Register to create a new user account.

data.name: Auth.AccessCodeRequired
data.value: Registering a new account requires an access code to be entered. Whoever invited you can provide this code to you.

data.name: Auth.AccessCodeWarning
data.value: If you do not have the code, kindly go away 👉.

data.name: Auth.UnableToCreateAccount
data.value: Melodee is unable to create a new user account for you.

data.name: Auth.RegistrationSuccess
data.value: Registered new account, you should get an email, be sure and click the validate button.

data.name: Messages.ConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

data.name: Messages.UnsavedChanges
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Do you want to continue?

data.name: Dashboard.NoPlayHistoryYet
data.value: No play history yet. Start listening to see your top songs!

data.name: About.Description
data.value: Melodee is a modern music server system that provides a comprehensive solution for managing and streaming your music collection.

data.name: Data.MergeConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to merge the selected items?

data.name: Data.DeleteConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected items?

data.name: Data.SelectItemsToMerge
data.value: Select at least 2 items to merge

data.name: Data.ArtistLockedMessage
data.value: Artist is locked. Locked artists cannot be deleted.

data.name: Data.SongLockedMessage
data.value: Song is locked. Locked songs cannot be deleted.

data.name: Data.SongMergingInfo
data.value: Song merging allows combining multiple song entries. This feature requires careful selection of songs to merge.

data.name: Data.PlaylistLockedMessage
data.value: Playlist is locked. Locked playlists cannot be deleted.

data.name: Profile.UnlinkConfirmation
data.value: Are you sure you want to unlink your Google account? You will no longer be able to sign in with Google.

data.name: Profile.InvalidTimeZoneDetail
data.value: '{0}' is not a valid IANA timezone id.

data.name: Profile.ProfileUpdatedDetail
data.value: Your profile has been successfully updated.

data.name: Profile.LinkingError
data.value: An error occurred while linking. Please try again.

data.name: Profile.UnlinkingError
data.value: An error occurred while unlinking. Please try again.

data.name: Validation.EmailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address

data.name: Validation.PasswordTooShort
data.value: Password must be at least {0} characters

data.name: Message.DragAndDropImages
data.value: Drag and drop or paste images here

data.name: Message.NoImagesFound
data.value: No images found for this album.
